title: Manufacturing Engineer - JK Tyre Ventures Solutions - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - JK Tyre Ventures Solutions - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
JK Tyre Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About JK Tyre Ventures Solutions:
JK Tyre Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JK Tyre Ventures Solutions!
